comment: Build-correctness and rendered-workflow gate: zero-dependency unit tests over the DOM-free episode/preset/template model, a preview-build smoke check, rendered preview/social/export workflows, and a headless layout-template workflow that uploads speaker videos, opens the real layout editor, saves/applies a named template, switches presets and back, and exports a playable custom-layout video. No seeded product media, committed fixture output, or verifier-only product paths are used.
